smoke.detail: Box smoke on FTO-43 fixture: RAscore=0.9907 (finite, in [0,1]); model.pkl unpickled under the pinned scikit-learn 0.22.1 + xgboost 1.0.2 + rdkit 2020.09.5 stack. pytest tests/test_model_rascore.py -m model -> 1 passed (validates single-object path against core.schemas.OutputRecord).

note: RAscore XGB/ECFP-counts retrosynthetic-accessibility classifier; second rung of the synthesizability ladder; box-solved linux-64 lock (129 sha256 hashes) with pinned 2021 sklearn/xgboost stack.
